generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HorizontalAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling precise horizontal movement of the gantry crane bridge. Operates within defined actuation ranges with safety constraints to prevent collisions or overloading."
]

instance VerticalAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling precise vertical movement of the gantry crane trolley. Operates within defined actuation ranges with safety constraints to prevent collisions or overloading."
]

instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet integrated at the end of the hoist mechanism for secure picking up and releasing of container-like pucks."
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded controller (likely PLC or microcontroller-based) for real-time actuation and feedback of the gantry crane system."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures angular displacement of the crane's movable components to track precise joint angles."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors environmental airflow conditions that may affect crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalAirflowDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
    base:desc "Continuous transmission of angular displacement measurements from the SwingAngleEncoder to the LoggingApplication for storage and validation."
]

instance EnvironmentalAirflowDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
    base:desc "Continuous transmission of environmental airflow measurements from the Anemometer to the LoggingApplication for operational context."
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneController
    base:desc "Transmission of operational state data (controller commands, sensor readings) from the CraneController to the LoggingApplication."
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneController
    base:desc "Transmission of trajectory execution metrics (position, velocity, acceleration) from the CraneController to the LoggingApplication."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "High-fidelity CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360, representing geometric and assembly details for visualization and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation of the crane's joints, linkages, and degrees of freedom enabling simulation of motion trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance CraneKinematicMeasurementsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured kinematic data including puck coordinates, crane joint angles, and acceleration measurements captured in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, TrajectoryExecutionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneOperationalStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational state data including controller commands, sensor readings, and system health metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionLogsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detailed logs of trajectory execution including position, velocity, and execution metrics for validation purposes."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryExecutionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance EnvironmentalContextData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental context data including airflow measurements affecting crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalAirflowDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, SimulationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance time-series database for storing operational data (sensor logs, control signals) with PostgreSQL compatibility and real-time analytics capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for creating and managing high-fidelity CAD models of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for aggregating and displaying real-time or historical data traces (actuator positions, system health metrics) with dynamic querying capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform facilitating portable, reproducible deployment of digital twin services (logging, visualization) across environments."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating signaling between services (e.g., LoggingApplication → Database → Dashboard) for real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance ArduinoControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-level embedded controller for interfacing with actuators (stepper motors, encoders) and sensors, enabling real-time actuation and feedback."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneController
]

// C6: Services
instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous capture and transmission of crane state data (position, velocity, trajectory execution metrics) to TimescaleDB for storage."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, TrajectoryExecutionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal control signals for crane actuators based on kinematic models and real-time sensor feedback for trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction, EnergyEfficientMotionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages kinematic models to predict and validate crane behavior, enabling closed-loop validation with physical execution."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationPredictionInsight, ModelValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulations using distance metrics (Euclidean distance) against predefined thresholds for discrepancy detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationDiscrepancyInsight, ModelUpdateAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization of crane states synchronized with real-time telemetry (position, payload status) for debugging and educational demonstrations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight, ControlErrorVisualizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies faults (motor stalls, sensor drift) by analyzing residuals between digital and physical states using machine learning or rule-based methods."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertAction, RootCauseHypothesisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane kinematic states (position, velocity, joint angles) for operational awareness."
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed analysis of trajectory execution metrics including position accuracy, velocity profiles, and acceleration patterns."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates and transmits optimal control signals to crane actuators for precise movement execution."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficientMotionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of energy consumption patterns during crane operations to identify optimization opportunities."
]

instance SimulationPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted crane behavior based on kinematic models and environmental context for preemptive decision-making."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of digital twin predictions with physical execution to validate model accuracy and identify discrepancies."
]

instance ValidationDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected divergences between digital twin outputs and physical telemetry, including root causes and severity levels."
]

instance ModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers updates to digital twin models based on validation discrepancies to improve accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization of crane states synchronized with real-time telemetry for operational monitoring."
]

instance ControlErrorVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of control errors and discrepancies between digital and physical states for debugging."
]

instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates alerts for detected faults (motor stalls, sensor drift) with severity levels and recommended actions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RootCauseHypothesisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of potential root causes for detected faults based on residual patterns and historical data."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the digital twin to the physical gantry crane are mediated by the **Control Application**, a Python program that uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to send commands to the crane’s controllers. Command types include trajectory setpoints (optimized by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) and operational directives (e.g., puck pickup/drop, emergency stops). Control messages are formatted as structured data (likely serialized via Python’s native types or MQTT payloads) and transmitted via the **MQTT Broker**. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not explicitly described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly enforces consistency by comparing executed trajectories to simulations, triggering alerts if deviations exceed thresholds. Feedback systems include real-time state updates from the **Logging Application** and dashboard notifications via **Grafana**. Conflict resolution is not detailed, but the system’s modular architecture (e.g., separate containers for control, logging, and validation) suggests prioritization of validated trajectories over raw commands. Command execution confirmation is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which verifies trajectory adherence post-execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents adopt a **modular, ad-hoc orchestration pattern** with **lightweight integration** rather than relying on proprietary frameworks. Key components include:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB (time-series database)**, **ActiveMQ (message broker)**, and **virtual machines** for behavioral adaptation, indicating a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with **loosely coupled components** for real-time and batch data processing.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Implements an **AutomationML-based Digital Twin** with **Microsoft Azure tools**, suggesting a **hybrid cloud-edge architecture** where the **Raspberry Pi (edge)** collects sensor data, and **Azure (cloud)** handles simulation/prediction. The **C4 Model** (context/container diagrams) is used for architectural visualization, emphasizing **component decomposition** (e.g., runtime visualization, simulation, prediction services).
  - **Gantry Crane**: Described via **C4 Model**, implying a **containerized or microservices-based constellation** with clear **scope separation** (e.g., control systems, monitoring). The **cyber-physical system (CPS) focus** requires **real-time coordination** between physical actuators (e.g., crane movements) and digital representations.
  Common orchestration themes include:
    - **Containerization/virtualization** for dissemination (e.g., VMs in GreenhouseDT, implied in gantry crane).
    - **Event-driven or message-passing** (ActiveMQ) for inter-component communication.
    - **Domain-specific pipelines** (e.g., Azure for air quality, AutomationML for modeling), avoiding monolithic frameworks.
  The **lack of a unified framework** necessitates **manual coordination** between physical and digital layers, with **domain-driven adaptations** (e.g., agricultural self-adaptation in GreenhouseDT vs. logistics in the gantry crane)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The lab-scale gantry crane Digital Twin includes a **Continuous Validation Service** that performs real-time comparisons between **executed trajectories** (measured via sensors) and **simulated trajectories** (generated by the kinematic model). The system calculates **distance metrics** to quantify deviations and enforces an **acceptable threshold** for error tolerance. If discrepancies exceed this threshold, corrective actions are triggered to maintain model fidelity. The GreenhouseDT exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both the physical system and its Digital Twin, though specific validation methods are not detailed. The Air Quality Management exemplar focuses on **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** but does not explicitly describe fidelity validation processes in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates within a **service-oriented architecture** hosted on a **personal computer**, with containers deployed via Docker (implied by modular service design). The **MQTT Broker** (Eclipse Mosquitto) serves as the central hub for inter-service communication, enabling asynchronous messaging between components like the **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**. Network topology is **local/on-premise**, with no explicit mention of cloud dependencies or distributed nodes. Bandwidth/latency requirements are unspecified but inferred to be low-latency for real-time trajectory validation (e.g., sub-second updates for distance metric comparisons). Redundancy mechanisms are absent, as the system lacks explicit failover protocols. Security protocols are not documented, though the use of a dedicated **Database** (TimescaleDB) and isolated services suggests minimal exposure to external threats. Data transmission from the **Logging Application** to the database is direct (not explicitly via MQTT), while service-to-service interactions rely on the broker."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed on-premise alongside the physical gantry crane system. The **TimescaleDB database** serves as the central storage for all system-generated data, including trajectory logs, sensor readings, and simulation outputs. Computational requirements are distributed across six containers: the **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematics modeling), **Simulation Service** (physics-based emulation), **Continuous Validation Service** (real-time metric calculations), and auxiliary services (MQTT Broker, Dashboard). Scalability mechanisms are not specified, but the modular design (e.g., separate services for trajectory generation and validation) allows for horizontal scaling of individual components if needed. Deployment models are containerized (via Python applications) but not explicitly cloud-based; the system operates independently of external platforms. Availability/reliability assurance is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**’s proactive monitoring and alerting, though no redundancy (e.g., backup databases or failover brokers) is mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **partial standardization**:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for interoperability, but no explicit industry standards are cited.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Adopts **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, a **construction/engineering standard** for automation systems, and leverages **Microsoft Azure** (proprietary but widely adopted).
  - **Interoperability**: All exemplars rely on **open-source dissemination** (GitHub) and **containerization/virtualization**, but no formal certification or compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247 for Digital Twins) are mentioned. The **ad-hoc approach** limits adherence to rigid standards, prioritizing flexibility over compliance."
]
